title: Graphene Based Free Energy Antenna System
description: This is the basis of an energy scavenging system using conductive ink and a clean earth. Mo Kha was the main inspiration for this - thanks mate his videos are at https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpLjEEUJW3YBchVFq-ecC0w/videos you can get the ink at www.workingink.co.uk
